title: viguiera rudbeckioides
intro: Viguiera rudbeckioides, also known as the rough-leaved viguiera, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viguiera rudbeckioides include relief from fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
